emptyListHint: No achievements found yet. Add the folder where your games store their achievement files, then refresh (F5).
revealedOnceUnlocked: Details for each achievement will be revealed once unlocked
noneUnlockedHint: Not seeing any unlocks? Check the FAQ / Troubleshooting section of the

startup.name: Run at login
startup.description: Watchdog starts automatically when your system boots.

kill.name: Keep running
kill.description: Keep watchdog running even if the main app closes.

hotkey.name: Overlay Hotkey
hotkey.description: Press this hotkey to show the achievements overlay while ingame.

language.name: Language
language.description: Interface language. Game data is fetched in this language when available.

thumbnail.name: Thumbnail orientation
thumbnail.description: Portrait shows tall box-art covers; Landscape shows wide Steam header images.

hiddenAch.name: Hidden Achievements
hiddenAch.description: Reveal the name and description of hidden achievements before you unlock them.

mergeDuplicates.name: Merge Duplicates
mergeDuplicates.description: Combine the same game found in several sources into a single tile.

timeMerge.name: Timestamp merge
timeMerge.description: When merging duplicates, which time value is preferred ?

hideZero.name: Hide 0% Game
hideZero.description: Hide games for which you haven't unlocked any achievement yet.

startup.name: Launch at startup
startup.description: Starts Achievement Watcher automatically with Windows, hidden in the tray.

onboarding.name: First-run guide
onboarding.description: Reopen the setup guide for API key, profile, folders, sources, and notifications.

hardwareAccel.name: Disable hardware acceleration
hardwareAccel.description: Turn off GPU acceleration if the overlay or window misbehaves. Requires a restart.

tray.name: Close to System Tray
tray.description: Keep the app running in the background for faster notifications startup.

emulator.intro: Defaults used by the right-click Apply emulator fix action. Choose how Steam is bypassed and how much game data is fetched.
emulator.loginDesc: Used only when "Data source" is set to Steam login. The password is stored encrypted on this PC and sent only to Steam by generate_emu_config. Steam Guard 2FA is prompted when needed. Leave empty to be asked each time.
emulator.loginTestRunning: Connecting to Steam… Enter the Steam Guard code if requested.
emulator.loginTestSuccess: Steam login successful. The generate_emu_config refresh token was saved.
emulator.loginTestMissing: Enter the Steam username and password first.

autoApply.name: Automatically fix newly detected games
autoApply.description: Runs the full Apply emulator fix chain once for a newly detected, unconfigured emulated game: SteamStub handling, GBE Fork, achievements, DLCs, identity/language, and Advanced data when enabled. Enabled by default.

mode.name: Emulator mode
mode.description: Regular swaps the game's steam_api(64).dll. ColdClient keeps it and loads GBE Fork's emulated steamclient via a loader — broader coverage for stubborn games.

steamSettings.name: steam_settings data
steamSettings.description: Simple uses Achievement Watcher's own fetch (anonymous). Advanced runs generate_emu_config for depot/language coverage.

login.name: Data source (Advanced)
login.description: Steam login lets generate_emu_config pull complete DLC/depot data. Use a THROWAWAY account only — never your main.

steamless.name: Auto-unpack SteamStub DRM
steamless.description: Runs Steamless on the game exe before patching to strip Valve's SteamStub DRM (original kept as .steamstub.bak). No-op when there's no stub.

steamlessExp.name: Steamless experimental
steamlessExp.description: Realigns sections during unpack for better compatibility with heavily-protected EXEs. Only matters when auto-unpack is on.

crackFix.name: Auto-apply community fix (CrakFiles)
crackFix.description: On every fix, automatically downloads and applies a confident-match community fix from the CrakFiles list (exact name match + pixeldrain link only; overwritten files are backed up). On by default — disable it if you don't want AW downloading/overwriting game files from a community source.

apiCheckBypass.name: Steam API ownership-check bypass
apiCheckBypass.description: Off by default. Drops SteamAutoCrack's bypass proxy (winmm.dll) + a redirect config so games that re-check the original steam_api/exe after the swap still launch and unlock. Downloads the proxy from its official release.

launchBat.name: Create Launch.bat for fallback
launchBat.description: When Steamless cannot strip a SteamStub exe and AW falls back to ColdClient, also writes a Launch.bat for the matching loader.

checkUpdates.name: Check for GBE Fork updates
checkUpdates.description: Re-checks GitHub for the latest GBE Fork build before applying (downloads only if newer). Disable to always use the cached build.

goldbergIcons.name: GBE/Goldberg — download icons
goldbergIcons.description: When enabled, the auto-repair that writes a missing steam_settings/achievements.json also downloads achievement icons from the Steam CDN.

info.toast: Some features are only available in Windows 10
info.autoSave: Changes on this tab are saved automatically.

transportMode.name: Notification transport
transportMode.description: Choose a single active notification system

notification.name: Notification
notification.description: Notify on achievement unlock if possible

rumble.name: Gamepad Vibration (XInput)
rumble.description: Vibrates first controller when unlocking an achievement

notifyOnProgress.name: Progress report
notifyOnProgress.description: Notify on achievement progress if possible

platinum.name: Platinum (100%)
platinum.description: Fire a dedicated toast when a game reaches 100% completion

mode.name: Notification type
mode.description: Where unlock notifications appear: Windows toast, the in-game overlay, or both

option.overlayPresetDesc: Visual theme of the in-game overlay popup
option.overlayPositionDesc: Where the overlay popup appears on screen
option.overlaySoundDesc: Sound played when the overlay popup appears
option.overlayVolumeDesc: Loudness of the overlay popup sound (toast sound is controlled by Windows)
option.overlayDurationDesc: How long the overlay popup stays on screen. Auto lets the preset decide; a value caps the on-screen time.

customiser.title: Custom preset
customiser.intro: Build your own overlay notification preset.
customiser.name: Name

option.souvenirScreenshotDesc: Capture the screen when an achievement unlocks. Saved per game.
option.souvenirDirHelp: Screenshots are saved to <folder>\<game>\<date> - <achievement>.png. Empty = Pictures\Achievement Watcher.
option.reposition: Reposition the popup (drag it where you want)

customToastAudio.name: Toast sound
customToastAudio.description: Specifies the sound to play when a toast is displayed

toastSouvenir.name: Toasted souvenir
toastSouvenir.description: Display souvenir screenshot within the toast

groupToast.name: Group by game
groupToast.description: Visually group toast from the same game within Action Center

useWinRT.name: WinRT API
useWinRT.description: Use WinRT if available for faster toast instead of PowerShell

useBalloon.name: Balloon tooltip
useBalloon.description: Fallback to balloon tooltip on toast notification failure

useWS.description: Broadcast achievement to all connected clients

useChromium.name: Chromium notification
useChromium.description: Uses chromium to show styled notifications.

screenshot.name: Souvenir
screenshot.description: Take a screenshot when you unlock an achievement

video.name: Video souvenir
video.description: Record a short video when you unlock an achievement using the hardware encoder of your GPU

codec.name: Video codec
codec.description: H.265/HEVC is more performant but less supported

folder.headline: Where to look for achievements files :
addInfo: Select a folder which contains appid folder(s).
For ALI213, Hoodlum, TENOKE, UniverseLAN, RPCS3 please select a folder where the
ALI213.ini, valve.ini, hlm.ini, ds.ini, steam_api.ini, SteamConfig.ini, tenoke.ini, UniverseLAN.ini or RPCS3.exe file is located.
libraryInfo: Select a folder that holds many game install folders (e.g. D:\Games, E:\SteamLibrary).
All games inside will be scanned for Goldberg/GBE achievements, even if never launched.

legitSteam.name: Display Steam Games
legitSteam.description: Steam must be installed and your Steam profile public !

steamEmu.name: Steam emulator
steamEmu.description: Read achievements written by Goldberg / GBE Fork and similar Steam emulators.

ea.name: EA Desktop
ea.description: Read EA Desktop's local achievement log — only for games installed outside EA's managed folders (cracked titles).

importCache.name: Import notification cache
importCache.description: Import Watchdog's cache as another source of achievement

fixAll.name: Fix all detected games
fixAll.description: Run the emulator fix (GBE Fork, achievements, DLCs) on every detected emulated game that has a known install folder.
fixAll.confirm: Apply the emulator fix to every detected game with a known install folder? Existing files are backed up before being overwritten.
fixAll.none: No detected game with a known install folder to fix.

diag.title: Diagnostics
diag.goldbergDesc: Scan a game-library folder for Goldberg / GBE Fork installs and flag the ones missing their steam_settings/achievements.json schema. Use a game's right-click menu (Diagnose / Repair) to fix one.
diag.winNotifDesc: Windows 10 >= 1903 : the focus-assist auto-rule for fullscreen apps (alarms only by default) can suppress toast notifications — set it to "Off" if toasts don't appear in-game.

advanced.blacklistInfo: Right click on a gamebox to add it to the blacklist.

apiKey.title: Steam Web API key
apiKey.description: Some Steam data requires a personal Steam Web API key.
apiKey.fallback: Leave this field empty to use automatic retrieval. If that fails, enter your own key.
apiKey.label: Your Steam Web API key
apiKey.security: The key is encrypted with AES-256-CBC before it is stored on this computer.

mainSteam.title: Main Steam Account
mainSteam.name: Filter by user
mainSteam.description: Show Steam achievements of only the selected account
